meta.subject: English Language
meta.source: NCDC Primary Six Curriculum Set One, English Syllabus

topics.title: Safety on the Road
subTopics: Road safety vocabulary (zebra crossing, pedestrian, traffic lights, pavement)
Modals of obligation and advice: must, should, ought to, must not

topics.title: Debating and Expressing Opinions
subTopics: Debate vocabulary (motion, proposer, opposer, chairperson, timekeeper)
Conjunctions of agreement and contrast: agree with, disagree with, in my opinion

topics.title: Family Relationships
subTopics: Extended family vocabulary (niece, nephew, sibling, in-law, cousin)
Possessive pronouns and genitive apostrophes ('s vs s')

topics.title: Occupations and Crafts
subTopics: Vocabulary of professions and artisan crafts (carpenter, plumber, tailor, surgeon)
Defining relative clauses using who, which, and where

topics.title: Hotel and Dining Etiquette
subTopics: Dining vocabulary (menu, waiter, bill, cutlery, reservation, beverage)
Countable and uncountable nouns with quantifiers (much, many, a few, some)
